heading: Report
label: 1131d Report
text: The Institute shall prepare a report once every two years on the activities of the Institute and shall submit such report to the Secretary of Education and the Secretary of State.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 628, and is classified to .section 627 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1131e of this titleAnother prior was renumbered section 629, and is classified to .section 627 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1131f of this title
Amendments2008—, substituted “prepare a report once every two years” for “annually prepare a report”.Pub. L. 110–315, § 618
